context.description: Chapter 1, "The eye trying to see itself," opens with a reflective section titled "Who are you really?" The prose challenges self-help promises and examines the desire for inner fulfillment and meaning.
normalization_notes: Translated German headings and prose into English control-language values.
No explicit chapter number is shown; chapter framing is inferred from the visible heading.

fields.chapter_title: The eye trying to see itself

rows.paragraph_text: The opening prose rejects easy answers and frames the journey as one of hardship rather than reward. It examines the human desire for inner fulfillment and criticizes self-help promises that claim to reveal the meaning of life.

content.free_text: book_page book_body_content chapter_page Chapter 1: The eye trying to see itself. Who are you really? Self-inquiry, inner fulfillment, and criticism of self-help promises.
